title: IntegrationsHealthResponse
description: Response shape of GET /api/v1/health/integrations. Every probe returns the IntegrationHealthEntry standard shape (US-004, cross-cutting pattern P1 + P4).

checkedAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the response payload was assembled.

integrations.description: Map of integration name → IntegrationHealthEntry. Every value validates against the entry definition.

summary.description: Counts of live/degraded/offline entries in this response.

status.description: live = probe succeeded; degraded = sub-optimal but serving (by-design fallback or recoverable); offline = probe failed or unreachable.

latencyMs.description: Wall-clock latency of the probe call in milliseconds. 0 for env-gated entries with no upstream call.

lastError.description: Last upstream error message, or null on success.

lastSuccessAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp of last live probe, or null.

ttlSeconds.description: How long this probe result is cached in process memory.

via.description: Env var name(s) gating the integration. Never carries secret values.

mode.description: Operational mode (e.g. paper, live, rest, websocket, simulated).

reason.description: Human-readable reason when status is degraded/offline.

fallback.description: What the system serves instead when degraded.

impact.description: User-visible behavior that fails when degraded/offline.
